message: The engine's self-review file (.engine/audits/audit-digest.md) is the plain-language record of the last time the engine reviewed its own health. It carries a check-value the audit writes over its own contents, so the file cannot be quietly altered after the fact. This rule re-computes that value from the file and compares: if the file was edited by hand after the audit wrote it — so its contents no longer match the recorded value — or is present but malformed, it goes red. To fix it, revert the hand-edit, or re-run the audit so it rewrites and re-records the file. While no self-review file exists yet, this rule passes — there is nothing to verify.
